title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Plum - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Plum - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Plum! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Plum:
Plum is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum!
